_comment: Biologist Pipeline Studio config. template_task_id = the ClearML controller template task to clone per run; leave empty to auto-discover the latest draft 'dapidl-pipeline-controller'. Create one with: uv run dapidl clearml-pipeline create-controller-task -t breast <dataset_id> xenium 2
_compute_note: compute_targets maps a friendly label to a ClearML queue. ONLY queues with a running agent actually run jobs (live queues: gpu-local, gpu-cloud, services). To add DigitalOcean, start a ClearML agent on a DO GPU droplet listening on a 'gpu-do' queue, then add {"DigitalOcean": "gpu-do"} below.
